title: MarketSense
description: A full-stack stock market analytics platform featuring an AI-driven sentiment analysis engine and custom Caffeine caching strategies for optimized real-time data retrieval.

title: SwiftSpend Wallet
description: A digital wallet MVP featuring double-entry ledger logic and custom high-precision error validation to ensure financial data integrity.

title: AI Lost & Found Mobile Application (Final Year Project)
description: A cross-platform mobile solution using computer vision and NLP-driven semantic search to intelligently match similar items across the platform.

title: Evently
description: An event-booking system engineered with complex time-constraint logic to manage concurrent scheduling and future availability.

title: VantagePL Analytics
description: A full-stack platform built to visualize Premier League performance data, country-specific metrics, and player statistics. Scraped data using Python from FBRef and integrated into a PostgreSQL database.

title: Insurance Quotation System
description: A specialized quotation engine utilizing BigDecimal for high-precision premium calculations and automated risk assessment logic. Allows for CSV file uploads for efficient data processing.

title: Job Board Platform
description: A recruitment portal featuring PDF resume upload, applicant tracking, and efficient database indexing for optimized job discovery.

title: Simple Rock Paper Scissors Game
description: A simple rock-paper-scissors game built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript to practice frontend development skills through the Odin Project.
